inputs.label: Annualized Volatility Asset 1 (%)
inputs.businessContext: The annualized volatility (standard deviation of returns) of Asset 1, expressed as a percentage. Used to determine its risk contribution.

businessContext_i18n.en: The annualized volatility (standard deviation of returns) of Asset 1, expressed as a percentage. Used to determine its risk contribution.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlık 1'in yıllıklandırılmış volatilitesi (getirilerin standart sapması), yüzde olarak ifade edilir. Risk katkısını belirlemek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die annualisierte Volatilität (Standardabweichung der Renditen) von Anlage 1, ausgedrückt in Prozent. Wird verwendet, um ihren Risikobeitrag zu bestimmen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La volatilité annualisée (écart type des rendements) de l'Actif 1, exprimée en pourcentage. Utilisée pour déterminer sa contribution au risque.
businessContext_i18n.es: La volatilidad anualizada (desviación estándar de los rendimientos) del Activo 1, expresada como porcentaje. Se utiliza para determinar su contribución al riesgo.

inputs.label: Annualized Volatility Asset 2 (%)
inputs.businessContext: The annualized volatility of Asset 2, as a percentage. Inputting a high value will reduce its weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: The annualized volatility of Asset 2, as a percentage. Inputting a high value will reduce its weight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlık 2'nin yüzde olarak yıllıklandırılmış volatilitesi. Yüksek bir değer girmek ağırlığını azaltacaktır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die annualisierte Volatilität von Anlage 2 in Prozent. Die Eingabe eines hohen Werts reduziert ihr Gewicht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La volatilité annualisée de l'Actif 2, en pourcentage. Une valeur élevée réduira son poids.
businessContext_i18n.es: La volatilidad anualizada del Activo 2, como porcentaje. Ingresar un valor alto reducirá su peso.

inputs.label: Annualized Volatility Asset 3 (%)
inputs.businessContext: The annualized volatility of Asset 3. Use a very large number (e.g., 1e9) if this asset is not in the portfolio to effectively exclude it.

businessContext_i18n.en: The annualized volatility of Asset 3. Use a very large number (e.g., 1e9) if this asset is not in the portfolio to effectively exclude it.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlık 3'ün volatilitesi. Bu varlık portföyde değilse, etkin bir şekilde hariç tutmak için çok büyük bir sayı (örneğin, 1e9) kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die annualisierte Volatilität von Anlage 3. Verwenden Sie eine sehr große Zahl (z. B. 1e9), wenn diese Anlage nicht im Portfolio ist, um sie effektiv auszuschließen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La volatilité annualisée de l'Actif 3. Utilisez un très grand nombre (par exemple, 1e9) si cet actif n'est pas dans le portefeuille pour l'exclure efficacement.
businessContext_i18n.es: La volatilidad anualizada del Activo 3. Use un número muy grande (p. ej., 1e9) si este activo no está en la cartera para excluirlo efectivamente.

inputs.label: Annualized Volatility Asset 4 (%)
inputs.businessContext: The annualized volatility of Asset 4. Set to a very large number if unused.

businessContext_i18n.en: The annualized volatility of Asset 4. Set to a very large number if unused.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlık 4'ün volatilitesi. Kullanılmıyorsa çok büyük bir sayıya ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die annualisierte Volatilität von Anlage 4. Auf eine sehr große Zahl setzen, wenn nicht verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La volatilité annualisée de l'Actif 4. Définissez un très grand nombre s'il n'est pas utilisé.
businessContext_i18n.es: La volatilidad anualizada del Activo 4. Establezca un valor muy grande si no se utiliza.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
